  const root = document.createElement('view');

  const emailField = document.createElement('input');
  emailField.setAttribute('placeholder', 'Email');
  emailField.style.marginBottom = '10px';
  emailField.style.display = 'block';
  root.appendChild(emailField);
  
  const emailError = document.createElement('text');
  emailError.style.color = 'red';
  emailError.style.display = 'none';
  emailError.textContent = 'Invalid email format';
  root.appendChild(emailError);

  const passwordField = document.createElement('input');
  passwordField.setAttribute('type', 'password');
  passwordField.setAttribute('placeholder', 'Password');
  passwordField.style.marginBottom = '20px';
  passwordField.style.display = 'block';
  root.appendChild(passwordField);

  const submitButton = document.createElement('button');
  submitButton.textContent = 'Submit';
  submitButton.setAttribute('disabled', true);
  root.appendChild(submitButton);

  function validateEmail(email) {
    const regex = /^\S+@\S+\.\S+$/;
    return regex.test(email);
  }

  function checkFormValidity() {
    const isEmailValid = validateEmail(emailField.value);
    const isPasswordValid = passwordField.value.length > 0;
    submitButton.toggleAttribute('disabled', !(isEmailValid && isPasswordValid));
  }

  emailField.addEventListener('blur', function() {
    if (!validateEmail(emailField.value)) {
      emailError.style.display = 'block';
    } else {
      emailError.style.display = 'none';
    }
  });

  emailField.addEventListener('input', checkFormValidity);
  passwordField.addEventListener('input', checkFormValidity);

  document.body.appendChild(root);
  __flush__();
</script>

<script>
  const createStepper = () => {
    const steps = ["Step 1", "Step 2", "Step 3", "Step 4"];
    let currentStep = 0;

    const root = document.createElement('view');
    root.style.display = 'flex';
    root.style.flexDirection = 'column';
    root.style.alignItems = 'center';

    const stepContainer = document.createElement('view');
    stepContainer.style.display = 'flex';
    stepContainer.style.justifyContent = 'center';
    stepContainer.style.marginBottom = '20px';

    const stepIndicators = steps.map((step, index) => {
      const stepCircle = document.createElement('view');
      stepCircle.style.width = '20px';
      stepCircle.style.height = '20px';
      stepCircle.style.borderRadius = '50%';
      stepCircle.style.margin = '0 10px';
      stepCircle.style.border = '2px solid black';
      stepCircle.style.display = 'flex';
      stepCircle.style.justifyContent = 'center';
      stepCircle.style.alignItems = 'center';
      if (index === currentStep) {
        stepCircle.style.backgroundColor = 'black';
      }
      stepContainer.appendChild(stepCircle);

      const stepText = document.createElement('text');
      stepText.textContent = step;
      stepText.style.marginLeft = '5px';
      stepCircle.appendChild(stepText);

      return stepCircle;
    });

    const updateStepIndicator = () => {
      stepIndicators.forEach((circle, index) => {
        if (index === currentStep) {
          circle.style.backgroundColor = 'black';
          circle.children[0].style.color = 'white';
        } else {
          circle.style.backgroundColor = 'white';
          circle.children[0].style.color = 'black';
        }
      });
    };

    const buttonContainer = document.createElement('view');
    buttonContainer.style.display = 'flex';
    buttonContainer.style.justifyContent = 'space-between';
    buttonContainer.style.width = '150px';

    const backButton = document.createElement('button');
    backButton.textContent = 'Back';
    backButton.addEventListener('click', () => {
      if (currentStep > 0) {
        currentStep--;
        updateStepIndicator();
      }
    });

    const nextButton = document.createElement('button');
    nextButton.textContent = 'Next';
    nextButton.addEventListener('click', () => {
      if (currentStep < steps.length - 1) {
        currentStep++;
        updateStepIndicator();
      }
    });

    buttonContainer.appendChild(backButton);
    buttonContainer.appendChild(nextButton);

    root.appendChild(stepContainer);
    root.appendChild(buttonContainer);
    document.body.appendChild(root);
  };

  createStepper();
  __flush__();
</script>
